ontology_hints: AXIS NOT IN POSITION is an alarm type within a Manufacturing Process.
It represents a Situation where a FeatureOfInterest (the axis) is not in its expected Position.
The alarm triggers an Action (e.g., shutdown, reset, or manual intervention).
It is associated with a specific Observation of the axis position.
The event occurs in the context of a Manufacturing Process and may be handled by Maintenance or Operations staff.
